basic_details.job_title: Allahabad University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Research Assistant, Field Investigator Posts
basic_details.short_information: Allahabad University has released an official notification for the recruitment of 2 Research Staff Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 03-08-2026.

application_fee.all_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: All Posts: No minimum or maximum age limit is specified in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in any social science discipline (55% minimum) with NET/ M.Phil./Ph.D. for Research Assistant. Post Graduate in any social science discipline with minimum 55% marks for Field Investigators.
qualification.details: Research Assistant: Post Graduate in any social science discipline (55% minimum) with NET/ M.Phil./Ph.D. Proficiency in analytical and data-processing tools such as MS Excel and SPSS is desired. Field Investigators: Post Graduate in any social science discipline with minimum 55% marks. The Knowledge about the research topic and geographical region is desirable with a desire to travel extensively for survey.

salary_details.pay_scale: Research Assistant: ₹37,000/- Per Month (Consolidated). Field Investigators: ₹20,000/- Per month (Consolidated).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Allahabad University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Allahabad University Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Allahabad University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Allahabad University Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Allahabad University Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Research Assistant: Post Graduate in any social science discipline (55% minimum) with NET/ M.Phil./Ph.D. Proficiency in analytical and data-processing tools such as MS Excel and SPSS is desired. Field Investigators: Post Graduate in any social science discipline with minimum 55% marks. The Knowledge about the research topic and geographical region is desirable with a desire to travel extensively for survey.

rows.fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Allahabad University Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: All Posts: No minimum or maximum age limit is specified in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Allahabad University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Staff positions at Allahabad University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Research Staff positions at Allahabad University is 03 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Research Staff at Allahabad University?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for Research Staff positions at Allahabad University, comprising one Research Assistant and one Field Investigator.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Research Assistant post, candidates must have a Post Graduate degree in any social science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks, along with NET/ M.Phil./Ph.D.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for a Field Investigator at Allahabad University?
faq.answer: The salary for a Field Investigator at Allahabad University is ₹20,000/- per month on a consolidated basis.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline. Candidates need to send their applications via Registered or Speed Post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for these Research Staff positions at Allahabad University will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. Where should the application be sent?
faq.answer: The complete application should be sent to Dr. Alok Agrawal, Project Director, ICSSR Major Research Project, Department of Commerce & Business Administration, Faculty of Commerce, University of Allahabad, Senate House Campus, Old Katra, Prayagraj 211002, Uttar Pradesh.

faq.question: Q9. Can applications be submitted online?
faq.answer: Yes, applications can also be submitted through the provided Google Form link: https://forms.gle/prbawwWi3uFrniA18.

faq.question: Q10. What is the project for which these positions are being recruited?
faq.answer: These positions are for an ICSSR Major Research Project on digital entrepreneurship in Uttar Pradesh.
